title: Clause Block
description: Numbered legal clause: a section of a contract or document with a free-form number, optional inline text on the label row, and optional nested content (which may itself contain clauses for sub-sections).

number.description: Free-form label rendered before the text. Examples: '§ 7', '7.1', 'I', 'A'. The author writes the § symbol explicitly when wanted — there is no automatic numbering.

text.description: Optional inline text rendered on the label row, after the number. Style depends on `level`: with level set, both number and text render bold + sized; without level, number is bold and text is regular body text.

level.description: Optional visual prominence. 2 = \Large bold (matches heading H2), 3 = \large bold (matches heading H3), 4 = body-size bold. When omitted, the clause renders in regel-style: body-size, bold label, regular text.

content.description: Optional nested blocks rendered indented under the clause. A nested `clause` block becomes a sub-section (e.g. § 7 with 7.1, 7.2, 7.3 inside).
